segment_summary: This segment introduces the concepts of Business and Platform services, highlighting their differences in data isolation levels. The speaker explains Global, Tenant, and Instance isolation, and then delves into the 'Master instance' concept, demonstrating how data can be combined and managed across different instances while maintaining read-only access for master data. Finally, the speaker provides an overview of the component functionalities within a microservice architecture, showing how JWT tokens carry isolation information and how a custom DbContext can inherit from an Isolation Component to apply automatic filtering. He then prepares for a live demo by showing a current DbContext without isolation and clearing existing migrations.
